text:
Den (デン) is the Rockbell family pet. Her gender is never directly stated in the original manga, but she is later confirmed to be female in multiple guidebooks. However, both the VIZ English translation of the manga and the Funimation versions of both anime, refer to Den as a boy in all instances, perhaps not realizing that Den is female. The Chuang Yi English manga correctly refers to her as being female. She lost her front left leg sometime before the start of the series in a traffic accident while protecting Edward and his friends (who are unspecified). As a result, she wears an automail limb in its place.

Den is fiercely loyal and, as such, has been called "Resembool's best bodyguard" by Pinako. Den is also particularly compassionate as shown by the way she attempts to comfort Pinako after Winry leaves home to work at Atelier Garfiel in Rush Valley. Edward Elric once mentioned that Den ate Alphonse Elric's cake, making Al sad. Unfortunately, Den is put largely on edge by Van Hohenheim's strange aura when he arrives at Pinako's house and nearly has to be restrained from attacking him.

In the last chapter, even she is surprised to see Al had regained his body, barking excitedly at the sight of Ed and Al. In a gaiden, she takes Al's helmet so for a family of baby birds.

Trivia

Arakawa has revealed in some story notes that Den's name originated from a dog she herself once had, a male dog named Densuke. The name is actually a Japanese variety of watermelon, considered to be the most expensive (and tasty) in the world. Fullmetal Alchemist Perfect Guide Book #2; First printed in September 2005; Square Enix; Japan
